block_0: Top performers of the healthcare sector
block_1: It isn’t surprising that the pharma sector got a giant boost during the pandemic. The invention of the Covid vaccine became the reason for a competitive race between vaccine manufacturers around the world. In 2021, the volume of deals in the healthcare sector was 27.8% higher than before the pandemic. But what is next for pharma stocks and what will 2022 bring?
block_2: In this week’s material we look back at how pharma stocks performed last year and analyze the possibilities of growth for the new year. Which stocks were the best in 2021 and which have the most potential now? Find out in the article.
